Metadata.description: Upload knowledge, create assistants, and chat with citations · Open-source knowledge assistant platform

Bootstrap.configErrorBody: The runtime configuration could not be loaded. Check that the service is reachable and the deployed config.json is valid, then retry.

NotFound.title: Page not found
NotFound.description: This address does not exist or has moved with the new navigation.

Language.label: Interface language
Language.description: Controls the language used for navigation, actions, messages, dates, and numbers.

Theme.sectionDescription: Choose the light or dark appearance that fits your environment.
Theme.modeDescription: Controls the appearance of the entire interface.

Appearance.localeSectionDescription: Set the interface language and how system time is interpreted.
Appearance.timezoneDescription: Beijing time is the default; daylight saving time follows IANA time-zone rules.

Settings.title: Settings
Settings.description: Manage your account, default assistant, model connection, knowledge settings, integrations, interface, and graph preferences.

Login.failed: Sign-in failed. Please try again later.

AccountSettings.identityDescription: The name used by the astronaut while navigating knowledge.
AccountSettings.signOutDescription: Return to the launch page to confirm or switch your local identity.

AppSidebar.emptyThreads: No conversations yet. Start a new one.

ArchivedThreads.title: Archived conversations
ArchivedThreads.description: Recently archived conversations appear first and can be restored or permanently deleted.
ArchivedThreads.allLoaded: All {count, plural, one {# conversation} other {# conversations}} loaded
ArchivedThreads.emptyDescription: Conversations archived from the sidebar will appear here.
ArchivedThreads.deleteDialogDescription: “{title}” and all of its messages will be permanently deleted. This cannot be undone.

SourceForm.created: Source created. You can upload documents now.
SourceForm.name: Name
SourceForm.dialogDescription: Sources hold content. After creation, upload documents and SAG will parse, chunk, and extract events automatically.
SourceForm.editDescription: Change this source’s name and description.

SourceCard.deleteDescription: “{name}”, its documents, and its conversations will be deleted. Search data will no longer be accessible. This cannot be undone.

UploadZone.uploaded: {count, plural, one {# file uploaded} other {# files uploaded}} and processing in the background
UploadZone.prompt: Drop files here or click to choose
UploadZone.support: Supports Markdown, text, PDF, and more · Up to {maxMb, number} MB per file

SyncPanel.started: Sync started. SAG is fetching pages in the background.
SyncPanel.title: Web sync
SyncPanel.description: Fetch pages configured for this source, parse and index them, and extract events. Sync again any time to get updates.

SourceMcp.title: Mount as MCP
SourceMcp.description: Connect this source to an MCP host such as Claude Desktop or Cursor and search its content directly with these read-only tools:

DocumentList.requeued: Added back to the processing queue
DocumentList.pausing: Stopping after the current chunk and saving the checkpoint
DocumentList.chunksAndEvents: {chunks, plural, one {# chunk} other {# chunks}} / {events, plural, one {# event} other {# events}}

Knowledge.title: Knowledge
Knowledge.description: Your sources: upload documents, index them automatically, and use them immediately in chat and search.
Knowledge.compactCreateDescription: After creation, continue uploading documents in the full management view.
Knowledge.emptyCompactDescription: Create a source and upload material to use it in search and chat.
Knowledge.emptyDescription: Create a source and upload documents. SAG will index the content for search and chat.
Knowledge.uploadDescription: Files are parsed in the background and become available to search and chat when complete.
Knowledge.syncDescription: The document list updates automatically after the latest content is synced.
Knowledge.emptyDocumentsUpload: Upload material to use it in search and chat.
Knowledge.emptyDocumentsSync: Sync the source to fetch the latest content.
Knowledge.sourceStats: {documents, plural, one {# document} other {# documents}} · {chunks, plural, one {# chunk} other {# chunks}} · {events, plural, one {# event} other {# events}}
Knowledge.modelWarningBefore: Documents can still be uploaded and indexed, but
Knowledge.emptyDocumentsDescription: Add a document from the upper-right. SAG will parse, chunk, vectorize, and extract events and entities automatically.
Knowledge.addDialogDescription: The document will be parsed, chunked, and processed for events and entities automatically.
Knowledge.syncDialogDescription: Fetch the latest connector content and update this source.

SearchStrategies.vectorDescription: Retrieve directly by semantic similarity for a faster response.
SearchStrategies.multiDescription: Combine entity relationships with LLM reranking for more complete results.

RetrievalTest.title: Test retrieval · {source}
RetrievalTest.description: Run a real query to see exactly which passages are retrieved.
RetrievalTest.queryPlaceholder: Enter a real question to test retrieval
RetrievalTest.empty: No content was retrieved. Rephrase the query or confirm that document processing is complete.

KnowledgeConfig.title: Knowledge settings
KnowledgeConfig.parsingDescription: Control document chunking and event extraction after ingestion.
KnowledgeConfig.chunkDescription: Set source-text chunk size and boundaries.
KnowledgeConfig.strictHeadingsDescription: Start a new chunk at each heading; best for clearly structured documents.
KnowledgeConfig.smartChunkingDescription: Group short paragraphs by content structure within the maximum token limit.
KnowledgeConfig.maxTokensDescription: Default: 1,000. Existing documents must be reprocessed after a change.
KnowledgeConfig.extractionDescription: Control event and entity extraction speed for each document.
KnowledgeConfig.concurrencyDescription: Chunks extracted concurrently per document. Default: 5.
KnowledgeConfig.retrievalDescription: Control knowledge retrieval and extraction language.
KnowledgeConfig.retrievalRulesDescription: Set the strategy, result count, and language.

ModelConfig.title: Model settings
ModelConfig.description: Generation, embedding, and parsing model parameters.
ModelConfig.mineruEnabled: MinerU 2.5 enabled with the existing 302.AI key
ModelConfig.keyConfigured: Configured; leave blank to keep unchanged
ModelConfig.generationDescription: Used for answer generation and information extraction, with OpenAI-compatible, Anthropic, and native Gemini protocols.
ModelConfig.connectionDescription: Choose a provider protocol, then configure its endpoint and access key.

providerDescription.openai: Works with OpenAI and compatible gateways such as 302.AI or private deployments.
providerDescription.anthropic: Uses the Anthropic Messages protocol with Claude streaming and tool calls.
providerDescription.gemini: Uses Gemini GenerateContent with streaming and function calling.

baseUrlDescription.openai: Enter the API root for an OpenAI-compatible Chat Completions endpoint.
baseUrlDescription.anthropic: Leave blank for Anthropic's official endpoint, or enter a custom proxy URL.
baseUrlDescription.gemini: Leave blank for Google Gemini's official endpoint, or enter a custom proxy URL.

ModelConfig.officialEndpoint: Leave blank to use the official endpoint
ModelConfig.providerChangedKeyDescription: The provider changed. Enter its API key; leaving this blank keeps the previously saved key.
ModelConfig.generationParamsDescription: Control the model, context, and request policy.
ModelConfig.contextWindowDescription: Total number of tokens the model can process.
ModelConfig.temperatureDescription: Lower values are more deterministic; higher values are more varied.
ModelConfig.fixedTemperatureDescription: This provider uses its required default sampling value for model compatibility.
ModelConfig.timeoutDescription: Maximum wait time for a single model request.
ModelConfig.retriesDescription: Automatic retry attempts after a failed request.
ModelConfig.embeddingDescription: Used for document embeddings and semantic retrieval.
ModelConfig.embeddingConnectionDescription: Leave the endpoint or key blank to reuse the generation model settings.
ModelConfig.embeddingNativeConnectionDescription: Anthropic and Gemini do not share this embedding format. Configure a separate OpenAI-compatible embedding endpoint and key.
ModelConfig.parserDescription: Configure parsing for PDF and other files. Falls back to MarkItDown when MinerU is unavailable or fails.
ModelConfig.parserEngineDescription: Choose the default engine and optionally configure MinerU.
ModelConfig.autoDescription: Prefer MinerU when configured and fall back to MarkItDown if the service or parsing fails.
ModelConfig.markitdownDescription: Use the built-in MarkItDown parser with no additional configuration.
ModelConfig.mineruDescription: Prefer MinerU for PDFs with fallback; other formats continue to use MarkItDown.
ModelConfig.mineruPricing: 302 MinerU is billed by PDF page. Refer to the provider’s current pricing.
ModelConfig.secretDescription: The key is never displayed. Leave blank to keep the current value.

AgentSettings.title: Default assistant
AgentSettings.description: Set its identity, greeting, and answer boundaries for new conversations.
AgentSettings.basicDescription: The avatar supports up to {max, number} characters; the name appears in chat and the sidebar.
AgentSettings.avatarDescription: Supports @_@, AI, a single character, or emoji.
AgentSettings.name: Assistant name
AgentSettings.petAlwaysOnDescription: Keep the assistant available in normal mode. When off, it appears only in exploration mode.
AgentSettings.greetingDescription: The first sentence shown in a new conversation.
AgentSettings.systemPromptDescription: Define tone, boundaries, and knowledge-use rules.
AgentSettings.systemPromptPlaceholder: Who are you, how should you respond, and what boundaries should you follow? For example: Answer only from the knowledge base.
AgentSettings.systemPromptHelp: Controls behavior for every answer. Leave blank to use the evidence-based default.

McpSettings.title: External tools
McpSettings.description: Connect MCP services that the default assistant can call in conversations.
McpSettings.invalidConfig: Unable to recognize this MCP configuration
McpSettings.mountedCount: {count, plural, one {# MCP service mounted} other {# MCP services mounted}}
McpSettings.mounted: Service mounted and available in conversations
McpSettings.mountedDescription: The assistant can call these services in conversations.
McpSettings.empty: No external tool services are mounted.
McpSettings.addDescription: Paste a standard configuration or enter one connection manually.
McpSettings.recognizedCount: {count, plural, one {# service recognized} other {# services recognized}}
McpSettings.mountCount: Mount {count, plural, one {# service} other {# services}}

errors.fieldObject: The {field} field for “{name}” must be a JSON object
errors.fieldScalar: The {field}.{key} field for “{name}” must be a string, number, or boolean
errors.argsType: The args field for “{name}” must be an array or string
errors.argsScalar: The args field for “{name}” may contain only strings, numbers, or booleans
errors.entryObject: Service configuration {index, number} is not a JSON object
errors.rootObject: The MCP configuration must be a JSON object
errors.serversObject: mcpServers (or servers) must be a JSON object
errors.serverObject: The configuration for “{name}” must be a JSON object
errors.noServerShape: No MCP service found. Check for a url or command field.
errors.nameRequired: Every MCP service needs a name
errors.httpOnly: The service “{name}” supports only HTTP or HTTPS URLs
errors.invalidJson: The JSON is incomplete. Check brackets, quotes, and commas.
errors.allDisabled: All MCP services in the configuration are disabled

McpService.title: Knowledge MCP
McpService.description: Connect the SAG knowledge base to external AI clients.
McpService.fullDescription: Connect the entire SAG knowledge base to external AI clients.
McpService.scopeDescription: Includes all sources by default. External clients can still narrow queries by source_id.
McpService.connectionDescription: Choose a transport supported by your client and copy the complete configuration.
McpService.tokenNote: The current access token is included when copied. {note}
McpService.toolsDescription: Read-only knowledge capabilities available to external clients.

QuickSetup.failed: Configuration failed. Please try again later.
QuickSetup.title: Start chatting quickly with 302.AI
QuickSetup.description: Recommended for new users: one API key configures the generation model, embedding model, MinerU document parsing, and retrieval. You can also skip this and configure everything later in Settings.
QuickSetup.keyDescription: The key is stored only in this deployment’s local configuration and is never displayed when read.
QuickSetup.defaults: Enables MinerU 2.5 (billed per page), a 128K context window, 1,024-dimensional vectors, and fast vector retrieval by default.

AppShell.exploreEnteredDescription: Select a galaxy to explore. Use the button in the upper-right corner to exit.

ChatPage.suggestionSummary: Summarize the most important knowledge in my library
ChatPage.suggestionConclusions: What are the key conclusions in this material?
ChatPage.emptyHint: I’m here. Upload material to Knowledge or ask me anything.
ChatPage.placeholder: Message {name}; type @ to choose a knowledge source

Conversation.defaultPlaceholder: Ask a question; Enter to send · Shift+Enter for a new line
Conversation.chatUploadsDescription: Documents uploaded from the chat composer
Conversation.documentAdded: Added to Knowledge under “Chat uploads”. Ask about it when processing is complete.
Conversation.maxImages: Up to {count, plural, one {# image} other {# images}}
Conversation.imageTooLarge: Image is too large (10 MB maximum)
Conversation.modelNotConfigured: A model is required for chat. Configure one in Settings.
Conversation.alreadyGenerating: An answer is already being generated. Wait for it to finish or stop it first.
Conversation.connectionInterrupted: The connection was interrupted before the answer completed
Conversation.imageUploadFailed: Image upload failed. Please try again.
Conversation.knowledgeScope: @ Knowledge scope{query} (↑↓ to select · Enter to confirm)
Conversation.webEnabledDescription: On: use built-in 302.AI web search and configured external tools
Conversation.windowUsageDescription: Percentage of the model context window used by this conversation

Citations.toggleAria: {action} {total, plural, one {# reference} other {# references}}: {internal, plural, one {# internal source} other {# internal sources}} and {external, plural, one {# external reference} other {# external references}}

PromptPreview.title: Model input for this run
PromptPreview.description: This input context is frozen before the Agent run starts. System instructions, conversation history, and the current question retain their roles. Available tools are supplied through a separate tools schema; this run’s tool results and answer are not included here.
PromptPreview.question: Current question

AgentActivity.incomplete: {count, plural, one {# operation incomplete} other {# operations incomplete}}
AgentActivity.toolsCompleted: Completed {count, plural, one {# tool operation} other {# tool operations}}
AgentActivity.retrieved: Retrieved {count, plural, one {# result} other {# results}} ·

Search.recentActivityDescription: Events created by document uploads and conversations will appear here in chronological order.
Search.moreActivityAria: Show more recent activity; {count, plural, one {# item remaining} other {# items remaining}}
Search.historyDescription: Completed search queries are saved on this device.
Search.localRecords: {count, plural, one {# local record} other {# local records}}
Search.clearHistoryDescription: This will delete {count, plural, one {# search query} other {# search queries}} saved on this device. This cannot be undone.
Search.noEvidenceDescription: Try a more specific query or use @ to narrow the knowledge scope.
Search.composingAnswer: Composing an answer from the selected evidence…
Search.collapsedPreview: {preview} The answer is shown as a collapsed preview. Expand it to access the full content and references.
Search.selectedEvidence: {count, plural, one {# relevant item selected} other {# relevant items selected}}
Search.placeholder: Search knowledge · Type @ to limit scope
Search.sortToggleHint: Currently sorted by {current}; click to switch to {next}
Search.viewToggleHint: Currently in {current}; click to switch to {next}
Search.startTitle: Enter a question to start searching
Search.startDescription: Answers use only relevance-ranked evidence and preserve clickable references.
Search.emptyGraphDescription: The matching events are not linked to entities yet. Switch to the list to view event summaries.

SourceGraph.emptyDocumentsDescription: Add documents and the graph will appear automatically as they are processed.
SourceGraph.emptyRelationsDescription: Only entities linked to events are shown here.
SourceGraph.stats: {events, plural, one {# event} other {# events}} · {entities, plural, one {# entity} other {# entities}} · {relations, plural, one {# relationship} other {# relationships}}
SourceGraph.statsTruncated: {shownEvents, number} / {events, number} events · {shownEntities, number} / {entities, number} entities · {relations, plural, one {# relationship} other {# relationships}}
SourceGraph.documentFilterTitle: Use all documents or select one or more documents
SourceGraph.noDocumentsSelectedDescription: Select one or more documents from the document scope.
SourceGraph.limitTitle: Limit how many events and entities are shown for each type

original.title: Original file preview
original.unsupported: Preview is not supported for this file type. Download it to view the file.

parsed.title: Parsed Markdown
parsed.failed: Document parsing failed, so no Markdown preview is available.
parsed.processing: The document is being parsed. Its Markdown preview will appear when processing finishes.
parsed.notFound: No parsed content was found. Reprocess the document and try again.
parsed.notReady: The document has not finished parsing.
parsed.empty: Parsed content is empty. Reprocess the document and try again.
parsed.truncated: This content is long. The preview shows only the first 500,000 characters.

search.title: Search knowledge
search.found: Found {count, plural, one {# relevant item} other {# relevant items}}

answer.emptyHint: Ask me anything you’re thinking about.

suggestions.summary: Summarize the most important content in the knowledge base
suggestions.conclusions: What are the key conclusions in this material?

answer.placeholder: Message {name}. Type @ to choose a knowledge source

detail.noCitationSource: No original text is available for this citation.

form.simpleAria: {name} in simple form. Click to switch to full form{status}
form.fullAria: {name} in full form. Click to switch to simple form{status}

PetAppearance.title: Assistant appearance
PetAppearance.description: Configure the desktop astronaut’s visor, actions, and motion. Changes apply immediately.
PetAppearance.savedLocally: These preferences are saved only in this browser.

face.title: Visor expression
face.description: Follow the assistant avatar or use a separate text expression. Leave it empty to hide visor text.

presets.title: Expression library
presets.description: Click to apply an expression, reorder favorites, or remove ones you no longer use.
presets.empty: The expression library is empty. Enter visor characters above to add one.

motion.title: Size and motion
motion.description: Control how much space the astronaut uses and the pace of idle animations.

reduceMotion.title: Reduce motion
reduceMotion.description: Stop floating, idle expression changes, and random actions while keeping essential status feedback.

UniverseScene.keyboardInstructions: Use the arrow keys to browse, Enter or Space to activate or lock, and Escape to clear focus. Drag to orbit and use the wheel to zoom; inside a source timeline, the wheel also travels forward or back through time.
UniverseScene.sourceStats: {events, plural, one {# event} other {# events}} · {entities, plural, one {# entity} other {# entities}}
UniverseScene.sourceStatsBuilding: {events, plural, one {# event} other {# events}} · building entity statistics
UniverseScene.relatedEvents: {count, plural, one {# related event} other {# related events}} · {category}

loadProgress.complete: The full time range has been explored; the current view is stable
loadProgress.clickContinue: Choose Explore more in the details panel
loadProgress.browseContinue: Scroll to continue through time, or use the controls below for precise paging
loadProgress.clickStart: Choose a source to start exploring
loadProgress.browseStart: Choose a source, then scroll to begin traveling through time
loadProgress.title: 4D knowledge universe exploration
loadProgress.sourceComplete: Finished exploring {source}’s timeline; queried {events, plural, one {# event} other {# events}} with {entities, plural, one {# entity} other {# entities}} currently resident

errors.unavailable: The knowledge universe is temporarily unavailable
errors.timelineLoadFailed: Failed to load the knowledge timeline

expansion.pageMore: Showing {committed, number} / {total, number} {relation}. Choose Explore more to continue.
expansion.capacityReached: The locked network reached the device safety capacity. Unlock the node before exploring further.
expansion.eventEntitiesComplete: All {count, plural, one {# entity linked to this event is} other {# entities linked to this event are}} visible.
expansion.noEventEntities: No related entities have been extracted for this event yet.

timeline.loading: Loading the adjacent page in time
timeline.windowReady: Loaded {visible, plural, one {# time record} other {# time records}}; adjacent pages preload in the background
timeline.movedEarlier: Moved into the next, earlier time range
timeline.movedLater: Returned to the previous, more recent time range
timeline.explorationComplete: Finished exploring the full timeline in {source}; it cannot advance further
timeline.unlockToContinue: Unlock the current node before advancing through time
timeline.capacityPaused: Queried {count, plural, one {# event} other {# events}}; the next complete time page exceeds the device safety capacity.
timeline.lockReleasedForCapacity: The device display budget decreased, so the temporary lock was released while keeping the current time range intact.
timeline.snapshotReloading: The graph changed, so the old timeline was safely cleared. Loading the latest snapshot automatically.
timeline.snapshotReset: The graph is still changing and automatic reload could not stabilize. Choose the source again to retry.

rebuild.queued: The statistics refresh is queued in the background
rebuild.timeout: Statistics are still being built in the background. Check again shortly.
rebuild.failed: Failed to refresh knowledge universe statistics
rebuild.running: Statistics are refreshing in the background

webgl.title: The 3D knowledge universe is unavailable
webgl.description: This browser does not expose the WebGL2 capability required by Three.js. Enable hardware acceleration and use a current browser.
webgl.contextDisabledTitle: 3D graphics are disabled by the browser
webgl.contextDisabledDescription: Chrome reports GL_VENDOR / GL_RENDERER as Disabled, which the page cannot override. Enable Use graphics acceleration when available in Chrome Settings → System, then fully relaunch Chrome.
webgl.contextCreationTitle: The 3D graphics context is temporarily unavailable
webgl.contextCreationDescription: The browser supports WebGL2 but could not allocate a graphics context this time, usually because of temporary GPU pressure or another busy page. Close GPU-heavy pages and retry; graph data will not reload.
webgl.moduleTitle: The 3D scene module did not load
webgl.moduleDescription: Browser graphics are available, but the scene code did not finish loading, usually because of a network interruption or version update. Retry directly.
webgl.sceneDescription: A WebGL2 context is available, but graph scene initialization failed. Current data is retained; retry directly and use the console diagnostic for the initialization cause.
webgl.contextLostDescription: The browser released the graphics context, usually because of temporary GPU pressure or a page transition. Current graph data is retained; retry to restore it.

stats.result: {events, plural, one {# event} other {# events}} · {entities, plural, one {# entity} other {# entities}} · {relations, plural, one {# relationship} other {# relationships}}
stats.overview: {sources, plural, one {# source} other {# sources}} · {entities} entities · {events} events
stats.overviewBuilding: {sources, plural, one {# source} other {# sources}} · {events} events · building entity statistics
stats.visibleContours: · showing {count, plural, one {# high-density contour} other {# high-density contours}}

searchLocked.label: Explicit exploration
searchLocked.description: In search results, the wheel only zooms. Lock a node, then choose Explore more in the details panel.

controls.previousTimePage: Return to the previous time range
controls.homeHint: Return to this source's entrance, then to the knowledge universe
controls.answerContext: Incremental clue graph · {events, number} events · {entities, number} entities · {count, number} answer turns

drawer.title: Graph display settings
drawer.description: Adjust node cards, entity types, and the time window independently. Changes apply to the current graph immediately.

cards.title: Node cards
cards.description: These options control persistent cards only, not nodes or relationships. Hovering or clicking still reveals the focused node card.

event.title: Show event cards
event.description: Show event summaries by default. Event stars remain available on hover and click when this is off.

entity.title: Show entity cards
entity.description: Show entity names by default. Entity glyphs remain available on hover and click when this is off.

entityTypes.title: Entity types
entityTypes.description: Choose which entity categories participate in the current view. Filtered entities and their event links hide together, event-to-event links remain, and at least one type stays selected.
entityTypes.emptyDescription: Explore knowledge containing entities and available categories will appear here automatically.

window.title: Exploration window
window.description: Control visible time points separately from reusable cache capacity so long explorations stay bounded.

visibleEventBundles.title: Visible time window
visibleEventBundles.description: Cap visible time points. Each time point stays complete with its entities and enters or retires naturally at the edge.

cachedEventBundles.title: Timeline cache capacity
cachedEventBundles.description: This caps the memory used for earlier and later times. Adjacent times are prefetched as needed, and existing cache is reused first.
cachedEventBundles.runway: Up to {count, number} time points reserved

reset.savedLocally: Changes apply to the current graph immediately and are saved in this browser.

OrbitalGraph.unsupported: This browser cannot start the dual-sphere 3D graph. Switch to another graph mode.
OrbitalGraph.platesAria: 3D event continent planet with entity orbits. Use arrow keys to select a plate or node and Enter to view details.
OrbitalGraph.nodesAria: 3D event core and entity dual-sphere graph. Use arrow keys to select a node and Enter to view details.
OrbitalGraph.interrupted: The dual-sphere 3D renderer stopped. Refresh the page or switch graph modes.
OrbitalGraph.emptyDescription: Only data with established event–entity relationships enters the dual-sphere orbit graph.
OrbitalGraph.entityStats: Outer orbit · {shown, plural, one {# entity} other {# entities}}{total}
